rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type scopes when they refer to component ports
Use annex agree {** ... **}; blocks for all AGREE contract elements
generic_rules: Component type annexes are the standard location for assumptions and guarantees
Implementation scopes are for bindings and assignments valid in that context
AGREE contracts must be syntactically valid within annex blocks
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use eq declarations for range comparisons with proper type alignment
Boolean expressions should only be used when the port is explicitly AGREE bool
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL properties like Compute_Execution_Time as AGREE variables
Avoid using subcomponent ports directly in component type contracts
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing parameters
Model fusion and scope preservation rules
